title: Dashboard
description: The Parthenon Dashboard provides an at-a-glance overview of your OMOP CDM environment, including data source status, recent activity, and quick links to key modules like cohort definitions, vocabulary browsing, and data exploration.
tips: Check your data source connections on the Dashboard to ensure they are active before running analyses.
Use the sidebar navigation to quickly access any module in Parthenon.
The Dashboard surfaces recent cohort definitions and analyses for fast access.
Superadmins can access the Setup Wizard from here to configure system settings.
